title: Sprint Health Record
description: Health snapshot for a sprint, capturing velocity, commitment ratio, defect counts, blocked items, scope creep, and team morale.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this sprint occurs

measurement_date.description: Date this health record was captured (ISO 8601)

planned_velocity.description: Story points planned at sprint planning

commitment_ratio.description: Ratio of completed to committed story points (0.0-1.0; target >= 0.8)

defect_count.description: Number of defects identified during this sprint

blocked_items.description: Number of backlog items that are currently blocked

scope_creep_pct.description: Percentage of sprint scope added after planning (positive = increase)

team_morale.description: Team morale RAG status based on survey or facilitator assessment

ai_experiment_success_rate.description: Proportion of AI experiments in this sprint that met their hypothesis (0.0-1.0)

retrospective_actions_open.description: Number of retrospective actions still open from previous sprints
